creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229531
Patch for libzen

Convert to CMake as it cleans up the build process and adds CMake support for users. While at it, modernize port and follow Porters Handbook more closely

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #1 stable/13-n247667-dc9094140c9 (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.0-RELEASE (i386)
